messages.content: What are the leave rules for teaching staff?

{"intent": "leave_policies", "title": "Leave Policies for Faculty", "subtitle": null, "sections": [{"heading": "General Leave Framework", "type": "paragraph", "content": "NMIMS provides a comprehensive leave framework designed to support faculty wellbeing while ensuring academic continuity. All leaves are governed by the provisions in the Employee Resource Book (ERB) and must be applied for through the NMIMS HR Management System (HRMS) at hrms.nmims.edu."}, {"heading": "Leave Entitlements", "type": "bullets", "items": ["Earned Leave (EL): 30 days / year", "Casual Leave (CL): 12 days / year", "Medical / Sick Leave (ML): 12 days / year", "Maternity Leave: 26 weeks", "Paternity Leave: 15 days", "Compensatory Off: As earned", "Academic Leave (Conference/FDP): As approved", "Sabbatical Leave: 6-12 months (after 7 years)", "Leave Without Pay (LWP): As sanctioned"]}, {"heading": "Leave Without Pay (LWP)", "type": "paragraph", "content": "When a faculty member exhausts all paid leave entitlements, additional absence may be sanctioned as Leave Without Pay at the discretion of the institution. LWP is not a right and is granted only in exceptional circumstances. Continuous LWP exceeding 30 days without prior sanction may result in termination of service."}], "footer": "Based on: NMIMS Employee Resource Book 2024-25, NMIMS Faculty Academic Guidelines, NMIMS Faculty Applications Compendium, NMIMS Faculty Employment Agreement Legal", "confidence": "high", "fallback": null}
Tell me more about the Conference / Research Travel Request

{"intent": "general", "title": "Conference / Research Travel Request", "subtitle": null, "sections": [{"heading": "Purpose", "type": "paragraph", "content": "The Conference / Research Travel Request form (HR-CR-01) is for approval of academic travel."}, {"heading": "Required Documents", "type": "bullets", "items": ["Conference / Paper Acceptance Letter (for conference)", "FDP Invitation / Registration Proof (for FDP)"]}, {"heading": "Budget Details", "type": "paragraph", "content": "The form includes a section for estimating the budget, with categories like Travel, Registration Fee, Accommodation, Daily Allowance, and Miscellaneous. The maximum amount requested from NMIMS is Rs. 3,00,000."}, {"heading": "Declaration", "type": "paragraph", "content": "The applicant declares that the project is original, has not been funded by another agency, and commits to submitting progress reports and a final report. NMIMS holds the right to publish/disseminate findings with attribution."}, {"heading": "Approval Chain", "type": "bullets", "items": ["Department Head (Level 1)", "Dean (Level 2)", "HR / Finance Budget Sanctioned (Level 3)"]}], "footer": "Based on: NMIMS Employee Resource Book 2024-25, NMIMS Faculty Academic Guidelines, NMIMS Faculty Applications Compendium, NMIMS Faculty Employment Agreement Legal, facult data", "confidence": "high", "fallback": null}
